name: python_backend
trigger_condition: Task involves Python code, testing, linting, or debugging
description: Python development skills: writing clean code (PEP8), unit testing (pytest), linting (flake8/pycodestyle), type hints, module structure, import management, virtual environments, dependency management.
expected_output: PEP8-compliant Python code with tests and lint passing
known_limitations: Cannot install system-level dependencies without sudo; type checking requires mypy not always available
